name: Pacific Cascade
description_short: Pacific Cascade Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving Oregon's Lane, Linn, Benton, Coos, Lincoln, and Douglas Counties with mortgage, auto, and home equity loans.
description_long:
Pacific Cascade Federal Credit Union (PCFCU) is a federally chartered, member-owned credit union headquartered in the Eugene-Springfield area of Oregon. Established to serve people who live, work, worship, or attend school in six Oregon counties, PCFCU operates as a not-for-profit financial institution regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), with member deposits federally insured up to $250,000. The credit union has expanded beyond its local footprint by providing access to more than 30,000 Co-Op ATMs nationwide.

PCFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, share certificates, mortgage loans, home equity lines of credit (fixed-rate and non-equity options), auto and RV loans, credit cards, and life insurance. The institution provides both traditional banking services—phone banking, wire transfers, bill pay—and modern digital channels including online banking and mobile services with CardValet. Current advertised rates include home equity lines of credit at 5.65% APR, new auto loans at 2.65% APR, and used auto loans at 3.65% APR.

PCFCU distinguishes itself through member-centric features including no ATM fees across its 30,000+ network, overdraft protection, no minimum balance requirements on e-Checking, and simple loan applications. The credit union has partnered with Balance, a financial wellness platform, to offer free member education programs including debt and budget counseling, credit report reviews, student loan coaching, and monthly webinars on financial topics across various life stages.

As a credit union, PCFCU operates on a not-for-profit model where members are partial owners, theoretically resulting in better rates and lower fees than traditional banks. However, membership eligibility is restricted to residents or employees of six specific Oregon counties, limiting accessibility. The organization emphasizes fraud prevention and customer service, with prominent warnings about scam prevention and clear guidance on legitimate contact methods.
services: Mortgage loans and home purchase financing
Home equity lines of credit (fixed-rate and non-equity)
Auto and RV loans (new and used vehicles)
pros: No ATM fees with access to 30,000+ Co-Op ATMs nationwide
Competitive rates: new auto loans at 2.65% APR, home equity lines at 5.65% APR
No minimum balance requirement on e-Checking accounts
Free financial education through Balance partnership including counseling and coaching
Member-owned not-for-profit structure with deposits federally insured to $250,000
Multiple service channels: three physical locations, phone banking, online banking, mobile app
cons: Membership restricted to residents/employees of six Oregon counties and their families, limiting accessibility
Only three physical branch locations, all in Eugene-Springfield area
Limited geographic footprint compared to large national credit unions
Website does not display current APRs for credit cards or detailed product terms
best_for: Oregon residents in Lane, Linn, Benton, Coos, Lincoln, or Douglas Counties seeking lower-cost banking
Members prioritizing local credit union service with no ATM fees nationwide
Borrowers seeking below-market auto and home equity loan rates
diagnosis: Pacific Cascade is ideal for Oregon residents in its six-county service area who want competitive rates, no ATM fees, and member-owned accountability. The primary limitation is strict geographic membership eligibility that excludes people outside these specific Oregon counties, making it inaccessible to non-residents regardless of loan qualification.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Pacific Cascade — NCUA-insured credit union in EUGENE, OR. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
